creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
benchmarks/iperf does not build on FreeBSD 12.2 amd64 (only arch tested on poudriere).

See two failed builds (separate poudriere jails),

https://pastebin.com/YQ6S5Mv5
https://pastebin.com/rqzwjNUf

As you can see, make.conf is already set to MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes. If you need build logs without MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes, let me know. I have those.
